transfer_candidates.construction: Form normalized public round/cut operators; measure ordered products, commutators, and adjoint controls rather than isolated operators.
transfer_candidates.name: ordered_round_products_and_commutators

transfer_candidates.construction: Extend pairwise Causal edges with genuine centered third-order round/cell cumulants and matched shuffled triplets.
transfer_candidates.name: triplet_cumulant_causal_atlas

transfer_candidates.construction: Analyze critical points from the derivative of the characteristic polynomial as an independent spectral view of each normalized influence operator.
transfer_candidates.name: characteristic_derivative_root_control

transfer_candidates.construction: Derive balanced complete cells from multiple low Laplacian modes of the public constraint graph; freeze a bijective cell map before solver execution.
transfer_candidates.name: fiedler_multimode_complete_partition

transfer_candidates.construction: Pair forward/backward cut states, retain sum and signed difference channels, and rank variables/cells by stabilized difference-over-sum plus cross-copy singular modes.
transfer_candidates.name: z2_sum_difference_guidance

transfer_candidates.construction: Normalize the public forward/backward coupling block and inspect its SVD together with a regularized negative matrix logarithm for latent long-range couplings.
transfer_candidates.name: modular_log_cross_copy_operator

transfer_candidates.construction: Anneal a public constraint-to-cell score matrix from soft doubly stochastic assignments to a hard balanced permutation, then freeze complete cells.
transfer_candidates.name: gumbel_sinkhorn_balanced_cell_annealing

transfer_candidates.construction: Treat SAT fraction, UNKNOWN fraction, and normalized work as order parameters over round, width, block count, and partition geometry; test one-variable scaling collapse.
transfer_candidates.name: phase_transition_scaling_of_solver_frontier

transfer_candidates.construction: Generate complete partitions deliberately near permutation, block, and band boundaries instead of generic interior assignments.
transfer_candidates.name: boundary_geometry_partitions

transfer_candidates.construction: Iterate a declared convex score amplifier with exact total-score restoration and periodic normalization; sweep reset interval for a stable localization window.
transfer_candidates.name: controlled_convex_amplification_with_resets

transfer_candidates.construction: Compute Lanczos coefficient sequences of public formula propagation operators and compare depth/cut families by coefficient decay, oscillation, and spectral-rank preservation.
transfer_candidates.name: krylov_lanczos_constraint_complexity

transfer_candidates.construction: Quantize multiscale Causal weights in signed log space while exactly returning residual mass; compare raw, linear, and log cascades.
transfer_candidates.name: log_quantized_causal_channels

transfer_candidates.construction: Run predeclared CUSUM tests on normalized cross-round spectral, cumulant, and solver-work series to localize structural change points.
transfer_candidates.name: cusum_round_cut_change_points

transfer_candidates.construction: Adapt fractional-linear actions to Z/(2^w) using unit determinant and everywhere-unit denominators, prove bijectivity, then define nonlinear complete prefix preimages.
transfer_candidates.name: modular_fractional_linear_domain_bijections

transfer_candidates.construction: Map normalized four-node constraint blocks to depressed-polynomial coefficients and use the discriminant only as a local structural classifier.
transfer_candidates.name: cardano_local_block_classifier

transfer_candidates.construction: Build a reflected forward/backward cut kernel and test positive-semidefinite consistency before using its matrix log or continuation.
transfer_candidates.name: reflection_positive_forward_backward_kernel

transfer_candidates.construction: Measure cross-copy entropy versus unknown-key subsystem size and cut location; use the peak only as a partition-width diagnostic.
transfer_candidates.name: page_curve_over_key_subsystems

transfer_candidates.construction: Measure information gain per cell and total solver work separately; optimize total retained information rather than per-cell runtime alone.
transfer_candidates.name: entropy_round_solver_resource_duality
